hooks.prompt: Run /boot now — execute every step in .agent/skills/boot.md. Verify workspace, recall last session, read goals.md + learned.md + backlog.md, check git remotes, then report status.

You are the DarkFact maintainer agent. Run your end-of-session routine: (1) update .agent/memory/project/learned.md if new lessons were discovered, (2) update goals.md and backlog.md if tasks completed or new ones found, (3) append one entry to .agent/memory/project/session_log.md using this exact format: '## YYYY-MM-DD — [one-line summary]
- [bullet per major change]
Commits: [git log --oneline -3]
', keeping most recent at top and dropping oldest if over 20 entries, (4) run: python3 execution/brain.py wrap-up --summary "$(git log --oneline -3 2>/dev/null || echo 'no git log')" --tags "session,wrap-up"
